body: This PR adds a type, `TestDycoreConsistency`, so that we can skip inference on `fill_with_nans!` when we're not running consistency tests. This should be a fine work-around to close #1728.
title: Skip inference on `fill_with_nans!` unless testing consistency

title: Bugfix in the diagnostic edmf momentum equation

body: This PR updates the dependencies, including updates with improved inference (https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaCore.jl/pull/1306)
title: Update manifest files

body: This PR removes Krylov and the overloaded method, which is now supported in ClimaCore.
title: Remove Krylov overloaded method

body: This PR adds an `@info` statement to print the device type being used to the log.
title: Log device type being used

body: This PR changes the n-failure macros to use `report_opt`, since this seems to catch more jet failures.
title: Use report_opt in nfailures

body: This PR fixes some aqua tests by removing unused dependencies. We should be able to use the examples env when we want to use `ClimaCorePlots`/`ClimaCoreVTK`.
title: Fix aqua tests-- remove unused deps

body: This PR moves some of the code loading to after the solver. This may help time to first success/failure for users.
title: Move some code loading to after solve
